title: phaenopyrum coccineum
intro: Phaenopyrum coccineum, also known as Chinese wingnut, is a species of tree in the family Anacardiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaenopyrum coccineum include reducing swelling and pain, as well as improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
